final_readjudication.stronger_claim_not_made: WS24 proves only that KT has reached bounded SOTA on the current live audited target with one verifier-only public verification horizon open and no red critical live-grade contradictions. It does not claim beyond-SOTA overall, does not open competition, H1, production, economic, or platform-governance horizons, and does not treat an open external challenge window with no findings yet as proof of adversarial exhaustion.

hard_stop_checks.detail: Repo hygiene and operator recovery receipts are both PASS.
WS15 status, canonical_hmac, and authority grade all passed on the sealed subject head.
Detached parity and same-host independent clean-environment replay are both proven.
Exactly one verifier-only public verification horizon is open.

Live readiness and authority grades now support the bounded frontier claim: repo hygiene is clean, operator greenlines are recovered, delivery integrity reruns are green, and the stronger closed horizons from WS12 remain explicitly closed except for the single WS21 verifier-only horizon.

live_grade_contradiction_check.detail: Live readiness and authority grades now support the bounded frontier claim: repo hygiene is clean, operator greenlines are recovered, delivery integrity reruns are green, and the stronger closed horizons from WS12 remain explicitly closed except for the single WS21 verifier-only horizon.
